title: thelypteris tahitensis
intro: Thelypteris tahitensis, also known as Tahiti fern or Tahiti maidenhair, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Thelypteris tahitensis include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate pain. Thelypteris tahitensis is often prepared as a tea or infusate, and it can also be used in herbal baths or applied topically to the skin as a treatment for various ailments.
